intro: Between April 16 and 2026, and April 23, 2026, ZCyberNews published six articles covering DDoS threats. The Mirai botnet was a prominent threat actor during this period, exploiting vulnerabilities including CVE-2025-29635, a high-severity flaw with a CVSS score of 8.8, and CVE-2024-3721, which has a CVSS score of 6.3. These attacks primarily targeted the social media sector with a global impact. The reported incidents included two high-severity events, three medium-severity events, and one informational report, illustrating a range of operational impacts.
